# ctyun_private_zones (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10026757/10033667



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}


data "ctyun_private_zones" "zones_example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) 内网DNS ID，精确查询
- `name` (String) 内网DNS名称，精确匹配
- `page_no` (Number) 分页页码，默认为1
- `page_size` (Number) 每页记录数，默认为10，最大50
- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID，默认使用provider配置

### Read-Only

- `zones` (Attributes List) 私有域列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--zones))

<a id="nestedatt--zones"></a>
### Nested Schema for `zones`

Read-Only:

- `create_time` (String) 创建时间
- `description` (String) 内网DNS描述
- `id` (String) 内网DNS ID
- `name` (String) 内网DNS名称
- `proxy_pattern` (String) 代理模式，zone：当前可用区不进行递归解析。 record：不完全劫持，进行递归解析代理
- `ttl` (Number) TTL值（秒）
- `update_time` (String) 更新时间
- `vpc_associations` (Attributes List) 关联的VPC列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--zones--vpc_associations))

<a id="nestedatt--zones--vpc_associations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `zones.vpc_associations`

Read-Only:

- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID
- `vpc_name` (String) VPC名称
